name: LessonQuestion
goal: Pose one multiple-choice question with composable lesson-option children — static by default, interactive when opted in (CDR-004).
description: Renders a prompt followed by a default slot of <lesson-option> children (and any inline hints like <lesson-note>). In static mode the correct option is revealed on render, which suits read-only study guides and vis documents. When the interactive attribute is set, options flip to clickable; on the first lesson-option-pick the question locks all options, marks picked + correct, fires lesson-question-answer with { value, correct, index }, and reflects the answered attribute on the host. reset() clears the state. The component listens for lesson-option-pick from slotted lesson-option children and decides what to do — lesson-option is a passive renderer driven by the question.

props.name: interactive
props.description: Opt-in (CDR-004): when present the options become clickable and the question listens for lesson-option-pick events. Default static rendering reveals the correct option upfront.

props.name: answered
props.description: Auto-set to true after the learner picks. Disables further interaction. Cleared by reset().

events.name: lesson-question-answer
events.detail: { value: string; correct: boolean; index: number }
events.description: Fires once when the learner picks an option. value is the picked option's value (or text), index is its zero-based position among lesson-option children.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Clears answered/picked/revealed state so the question can be retaken.

slots.description: lesson-option children, optionally a lesson-note hint, and any inline narrative HTML. Children render in order via the default slot.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Outer vertical margin + prompt bottom margin.

sideEffects.description: Tracks picked/revealed flags on slotted lesson-option children.
sideEffects.reason: Required to render the post-answer UI and prevent re-answering.

sideEffects.description: Reads and writes attributes on its direct lesson-option children.
sideEffects.reason: Single-source-of-truth for whether options are interactive and whether the answer is revealed.

nondeterministicReason: state side effect prevents byte-identical innerHTML across runs
